raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a mutable object",
    "b must be a valid key for a"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the item at key b in a is deleted",
    "no return value"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a is not a mutable object",
    "b is not a valid key for a",
    "a is None",
    "b is None"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a list",
    "b must be an integer",
    "a must contain at least one element",
    "b must be a valid index for a"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a will contain one less element",
    "a[b] will be removed from a"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if b is out of range, a will not change",
    "if b is negative, a will not change",
    "if b is greater than or equal to the length of a, a will not change"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.hf:

```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a list",
    "b must be an integer",
    "a must contain at least one element",
    "b must be a valid index for a"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a will have one less element",
    "b will be removed from a"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "If a is empty, a ValueError will be raised",
    "If b is out of range, a ValueError will be raised"
  ]
}
```
